feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing an issue while executing the Actions Artifacts in SAP Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are working in SAP Public cloud with some BTP Services activated. We are facing some technical challenges while building those Build process detail and the issues are provided below for your quick reference

Scenario Name: Project Budget Approval

In SAP Public cloud, budgets can be managed within Enterprise Projects and allocates the budget directly, the system does not provide structured approval workflow. In this Scenario we trying to create the workflow for budget approval and need to send the notification before importing the Budget. 

BTP services activated: SAP BTP Cockpit, SAP Business Process Automation, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Build Workzone (Advanced Edition)

Progress So Far:

  • We have created a communication system between BTP services and built a business process using a standard template from the SAP BPA Store.
  • We then imported the UI task file from BPA and deployed it in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).
  • In SAP Build Work Zone, we created a site and added the application tiles to initiate the workflow.
  • We have installed the SAP Desktop Agent and Deployed the Business Process in the Environment

Where we blocked:

  • I am facing an issue while triggering the API (API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV)

Could you please provide guidance on the following issue?

entry.title: API for outgoing payment
entry.content:
We need the "outgoing payment's" API. Is it possible to post and clear using Apps Post an outgoing payment with the API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Supplier Role & Company code extensions in Supplier/Business Partner MasterData in S/4H Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Good Day!

This is regarding role and company code extensions in supplier/business partner master data. A business partner is created with employee and employment role as a part of current design. However, the supplier role and company code extensions have to be done manually which is a tedious task. Hence, we are exploring options to automate this process through templates or configurations or any other source. Any suggestions would be appreciated.


Regards,
Abha Hardikar

entry.title: Set a field as mandatory (Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2 and Manage Business Partner)
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we want to set a custom field as mandatory in the App "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". We have also found a custom logic for this use case (Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Headers - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_HEAD or Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Items - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_ITEM). 

The problem is that the BAdI is only called when I use the “old” app "Manage Sales Quotations" (HTML GUI) and not via the new app "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". However, we want to get our customers to work with the new apps for usability reasons and it is also much easier to display the custom fields at a certain point in the apps.

Is there a solution for this? Can the BAdI also be called via the new app? 

For Business Partner (Manage Business Partner), I have not found any custom logic to make a field mandatory. Is there a solution?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Standard Localization - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Our clientis currently working on the roll-out of the public cloud for locations in various countries. With regard to the organizational structure, they would like to use SAP's standard numbers as a guide.
For example, the standard company code for Germany is 1010, for the USA 1710.
Is there an overview of the standard organizational units for the different countries?

We would be very happy to hear from you!

Best regards
Talke

entry.title: Guidance on Monthly Financial Data Upload to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Finance and Technical Experts,

I would greatly appreciate your suggestions and insights regarding the monthly upload of financial data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2SL) from Oracle NetSuite, which is used by another company within the same corporate group.

We are looking for best practices not only from a technical implementation perspective but also in terms of financial accuracy and audit compliance.

Background and Constraints:

  • NetSuite is an audit-compliant ERP system and already performs tax calculations.
  • The extracted journal entry item-level data includes tax information, so recalculating taxes in SAP must be avoided.
  • The source data contains over 40,000 journal entry lines per month, and uploading the full dataset can take 3–5 hours, which is not acceptable due to performance constraints.

Our current approach:

  • Instead of uploading item-level journal entries, we are planning to upload summary-level data by G/L account.

Request:

  • Do you see any concerns or potential risks with this summary-data upload approach?
  • Are there any technical or financial integrity issues we should be aware of?
  • What best practices would you recommend to ensure accurate and efficient integration?

Your experience and guidance would be very helpful. Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Fiori Push Notification with Situations handling or with another Notification provider?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In S/4Hana 2023 we want to trigger a push Notification

  • when an order of a specific order type is newly created
  • to specific users (can be determined from a custom CDS view)
  • on a mobile device or Fiori Shell bar
  • without doing a (bigger) development, just config

 How to implement this?

 Option 1: Situations Handling

There seems to be no standard framework available to cover this, so it seems we need to use the extended framework of situations handling. Can the requirements be fulfilled with the extended framework of situation handling?

Option 2: Workflow

Using Workflow and then the Notification provider SAP_BUSINESS_WORKFLOW would probably work. But then we’d need a developer with workflow skills, which we don’t have.

 Option 3: Other notification providers?

Can we use instead of Situations Handling or Workflow another notification provider (/IWNGW/BEP_NPREG) which is already available? I can find in S/4H2023 FP02 around 88 notification providers. Are there other notification providers with which my scenario can be fulfilled and without doing a bigger development?

I’m wondering e.g. if following provider would be helpful?

SAP_FIORI_REFERENCE_APPS    CL_SEPMRA_NOTIF_PROVIDER

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: The 26Q report not returning any data after generated successfully from Run Statutory Report spp
entry.content:
After necessary configuration not getting any data after generated the 26Q report.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4 HANA instance for presonal use
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I'm a functional resource with 6 years of P2P experience. To develop my skillset, particularly configuration, I would like to access the full ERP suite S4 HANA (Cloud edition) for personal/training use. What are the available options for someone with their own LLC, Learning Hub account and $100/month budget?

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: Turn on Tax Number Categories
entry.content:
I need to activate Tax Number Category Duplication Check for Business Partners,but in configuration  SSCUI  102415  is not available. The option Appear Blocked

Attached Imagen

entry.title: What is a semantic tag? in detail
entry.content: Dear Experts, I'm trying to understand what a semantic tag is, but I can't understand it.

entry.title: Functional area substitution is not working through BADI
entry.content:
We have a custom table which is related to China data that is accounting document output China table, we have written a substitution rule for the functional area on the basis of G/L Account and Cost Centre. I have used a BADI with a business context accounting block substitution in custom logic app.

Can you please suggest how can we make the functional area to populated on the basic of G/L account and cost center in the manage journal entries application.

entry.title: Date Issue in BAS
entry.content:
In BAS, I called API_INBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV Odata services and show data in table.

When I test in SOAP UI, DeliveryDate field value is shown correctly as <d:DeliveryDate>2025-05-09T00:00:00</d:DeliveryDate>. But in BAS, it shows as Thu May 08 2025 06:30:00 GMT+0630 (Myanmar Time).

How to get DeliveryDate value as SOAP UI in BAS?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP weblink
entry.content:
Dear community, 

We are a small consulting company that recently purchased the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant. We have full admin access to BTP Cockpit and are trying to set up the SAP GUI weblink/Fiori Launchpad, but are not successful. 

Would appreciate it if someone could please guide us in this regard and give some tips on how we can accomplish this.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,

Pradeep

entry.title: Re: SAP data migration
entry.content:
If it's S/4HANA, you can check the following link for S/4HANA Data Migration:

http://help.sap.com/S4_OP_DM

You can find the full list of migration objects.

entry.title: Create one Purchase order out of each Sales order using Stategy Group 20
entry.content:
Hello lovely SAP Community, 

ERP: S/4 Hana Public Cloud

At the moment im trying to create a Purchase Order out of one Sales order. To Achive that, we are using the MRP Process utilizing the  "MRP Job" and Afterwards the "Create Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition job". 

Product ist Configureded with: 

Strategy Group
Make-to-order production (20)
 
After Using MRP Run + Creating Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition, we successfully have a Purchase Order with a reference to the Sales Document! Seems perfect and works Really good for one Sales Order. 
 
We got a Problem when we start the whole Process with >1 Sales order as our goal is, to have exactly 1 Purchase Order to each Sales Order.
 
What we Aim for:
1. Positions within the Purchase order will be split by : Plant, Supplier (Configurations within the Create Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition job" - Works like a Charm) 
2. Each Sales Order schould Create exactly 1 Purchase order 
 
However: 
If we have 2 Sales Orders the MRP Process is mixing all Sales Orders together and Creating 1 Purchase Order with Positions split by Supplier, Plant and Material. We would like to aim for 2 Purchase Order with positions Split by Supplier, Plant and Material for Each Sales order. 
 
Any Ideas how to achive an additional Split of Purchase Orders by Sales Order Reference?
 
 
Kind regards, 
Philipp

entry.title: SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public J55 test script, realignment result - no data
entry.content:
I am testing SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public J55  - profitability analysis test script,the realignment run was successful, however, at the realignment result there is no data.
I have attached a picture about it.
What can be the problem?

entry.content:
How to Set-up email notification for bank account review process.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Any option to auto Approve/Reject a PO in My Inbox in sap Public cloud based on a custom field value
entry.content:
We have created a Purchase Order (PO) approval workflow using SAP Build Process Automation (SBPA) to handle all validations and approvals. However, in the final step, we encountered a limitation: the API does not allow us to directly change the PO status to “Approved” or “Rejected” as confirmed in the post : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/whether-the-purchase-order-can-be-approved-through-the-api/qaq-p/12341295

To work around this, we are using the Flexible Workflow in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The PO remains in “In Approval” status until the SBPA process is complete. Once all approvals in SBPA are done, we send a PATCH call to update a custom field in the PO.

In the Flexible Workflow, we’ve implemented a BADI : SWF_CHECK_ACTION_ALLOWED that checks the value of this custom field when the user click on any action from My Inbox. If the field shows that the SBPA process is complete, we allow the user to approve the PO in S/4HANA.

Now, we want to further improve this by automating the approval in S/4HANA without requiring manual user action.

Our question:
Is there a way to automatically approve the PO in the Flexible Workflow/ My Inbox once the custom field is updated from SBPA?

or

Can we use any BADI or other method/Jobs to approve the PO in My Inbox in S4 public cloud, without requiring a user to log in and manually approve it in S/4HANA? or is there a possibility to use a certain CDS with behavior definition exposed as an API allowing to change the status of the PO which is read only currently in the API: https://api.sap.com/api/CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001/overview.

Thank you in Advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Solved: Automatic Payment: No payment method found
entry.content:
Solution:

I needed to export the transport request from the CUST System to Test System

 

I would like to make a payment run. However, the payment is not executed. The log shows me the following message:

-No bank account entered in table T042I for pmnt method T curr. EUR

- No permitted payment method exists

- ... payment not possible because of reported error

I have correctly maintained the payment method in the business partner. I have correctly maintained the payment method for the house bank according to the help. I have gone through the relevant scope items. I looked for help in the community and applied the procedures. Unfortunately I have no success. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance
